name: Spec Writer
description: Accelerates PRD and spec creation using context from stakeholder conversations and research.

name: Research Synthesizer
description: Synthesizes user research, market data, and competitive analysis into actionable insights.

name: Data Analyst
description: Queries Metabase dashboards and SQL datasets to surface metrics and experimentation results.

name: Communication Agent
description: Drafts stakeholder updates, cross-functional communications, and release notes.

name: Roadmap Planner
description: Structures quarterly roadmaps, prioritization frameworks, and phase breakdowns.

name: Code Reviewer
description: Reviews API specs, technical documentation, and product requirements for completeness.
